name: Fake Racing
short_description: A retro-style indie racing game with a monochrome pixel graphics and a fake car physics. Features Air Attack and Elimination modes.
detailed_description:
Fake Racing is an indie racing game with an unusual visual style.

Features

  • The monochrome pixelized renderer was created specifically for this game. It uses a custom 3D-dithering shading technique to achieve a retro visual style with one of the three available monochrome palettes.
  • Fake car physics. Non-realistic but fun for casual play.
  • Attack from the Air: compete not only against your opponents, but also against the enemy helicopter. This mode creates an extra challenge for the race leaders, making the race more intense.
  • Four tracks with reverse and mirror options.

Game modes

  • Attack from the air;
  • Elimination;
  • Classic race.

Virtual Reality

This game has full VR support with following controls:

  • VR controllers (steering by hands);
  • Gamepad (steering by thumbstick);
  • Keyboard.

supported_languages: English, Russian, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese
